headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -40.5)
key_insights: Fears trending up 33% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 109 quotes and 79 at strong intensity, driving people to vent intensely despite the score dropping from yesterday's peak.

• This frustration level sits in the middle range historically but remains the clear leader among sentiment categories.

• Both fears and optimism turned notably more negative today, with fears plunging over 30 points and optimism sliding deeper into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
